articles.title: China drags down crypto market: here’s what large traders are saying
articles.description: The crypto charts look brutal, but traders don’t think that we’ve reached the point of full capitulation. articles.title: Ethereum Price Analysis: ETH Fighting Over $2000 After Crashing 55% In 11 Days
